snippet.title: The Fragrance Community FORGOT These 10 Perfumes | Big Mistake
snippet.description:
🌟 The fragrance community hyped these perfumes, then completely forgot about them. That's a big mistake — and today we're fixing it. 💕

Welcome to my channel! I’m Diana, your go-to fragrance enthusiast with over 5 years of experience collecting perfumes. In this perfume review, I'm revisiting 10 underrated perfumes that shaped the fragrance community but somehow disappeared from the conversation. From classics to hidden gems, these are the forgotten fragrances every perfume lover should rediscover.

✨ What We Discuss:
0:00 Fragrances we have abandoned...
0:43 🌸 Kenzo Flower  — the original powdery floral icon
2:25 🌸 Narciso Rodriguez Poudree  — the musky modern take
3:51 🌸 M. Micallef Ylang In Gold — lush, tropical, and utterly forgotten
5:36 ☕ Montale Intense Cafe  — rose & coffee at its absolute best
7:05 🍊 Parfums de Marly Oriana  — living in Delina's shadow unfairly
8:29 🖤 Tom Ford Velvet Orchid  — Black Orchid's more wearable sister
10:20 🍂 Kayali Invite Only Amber 23 — the tobacco gourmand nobody talks about
11:42 🌹 Dior Poison Girl  — the most sophisticated sweet fragrance ever
13:15 🌿 Valentino Born in Roma  — buried under its own flankers
14:41 🍓 Burberry Her EDP  — the fruity skin scent we abandoned too soon

💖 If you enjoy fragrance reviews, don’t forget to hit that LIKE button and SUBSCRIBE for more scent exploration. 

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLROQSyYN8m5zVeP9Npf915x1yC1aizU13
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLROQSyYN8m5ymt7VKIS77Tp_6t0ScaPd_

📌 Join the Conversation: Have you already tried any of these? Let me know in the comments which ones you still wear! 👇

🔔 Stay Connected: Follow me for more fragrance insights, tips, and reviews to help you smell and feel your best! 

Whether you love designer fragrance reviews, niche perfumery, or you're hunting for your next signature scent, this video has something for you. These are some of the best perfume recommendations I can give — and I think they all deserve a second chance.

💌: fragrancefrenetic@gmail.com
IG: DianasFragranceCloset
TikTok: DianasFragranceCloset

#forgottenfragrances #underratedperfumes #perfumereview #fragrancecommunity #nicheperfume #montaleintensecafe #diorpoisongirl #burberryher #tomfordvelvetorchid #parfumsdemarly
